name: webwright
description: Turn your coding agent into a SOTA browser agent. Drives a local Playwright workspace via one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into final_runs/run_<id>/, and visually self-verifies the result.

interface.shortDescription: SOTA browser agent driven by your coding agent
interface.longDescription: Drives a local Playwright workspace via one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into final_runs/run_<id>/, and visually self-verifies the result.
